Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mildly elevated ALT, indicating possible liver involvement. Triglycerides and HDL cholesterol are also high, which may increase cardiovascular risk. Globulin is low, which could reflect immune or protein synthesis issues. Other parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further evaluation are recommended.
